hero.title: The Optimal Offline Exam Distributed Platform
hero.description: QuizForge is a powerful Monorepo system designed for educators. Create, distribute as single executables, and collect results via LAN without internet.

single_exe.title: Single Executable
single_exe.description: Exams and data are securely packed into one standalone `.exe` using Advanced Binary Overlays.

lan.title: LAN Submissions
lan.description: No internet required. Students submit directly to your local Creator Server via Wi-Fi.

security.title: AES-256 Validated
security.description: Military-grade encryption for all quiz settings and answers to prevent cheating.

download.title: Ready to transform your classroom?
download.description: Get the latest QuizForge release below.

feedback.title: Feedback & Reviews
feedback.description: Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Or simply love the software? Let us know below.
feedback.success_description: Your feedback has been submitted to the moderation queue.
feedback.placeholder_message: I think the question editor needs more colors...
feedback.attachments_hint: Drag & drop images here, or click to select
